todos.title: Week 1: Business Setup & Contractor Onboarding
subtasks: Setup tool stack: Stripe, ConvertKit, OpenAI API accounts
todos.details: Foundation phase - establish business legal structure and secure key contractor partnerships. This unblocks all content production.

todos.title: Week 1-2: Dropshipping Content Creation
todos.details: Create validation test book. Content must be satirical, data-driven, contrarian. All claims backed by statistics.

todos.title: Week 2: Design Specification & Handoff
subtasks: Define image requirements (hero, portraits, charts, comics)
Create design brief and master package
todos.details: Prepare all design assets and specifications. Designer will use these to create InDesign template and layout dropshipping book.

todos.title: Week 3-4: KDP Account & Processes
subtasks: Setup KDP account and author profile
Setup proof copy ordering and review workflow
todos.details: Establish Amazon KDP infrastructure and processes. This is the distribution channel for print books.

todos.title: Week 3-6: Write Batch A Topics (2-5)
todos.details: Write content for Topics 2-5 in parallel with designer working on dropshipping book. Build content inventory ahead of design schedule.

todos.title: Week 4-5: AI Evaluator Configuration
subtasks: Test AI roast generation and PDF delivery
todos.details: Build lead magnet system. AI generates 'roast' PDFs of user business ideas, capturing emails for nurture funnel.

todos.title: Week 5-6: Email Automation Setup
subtasks: Configure CTA links to purchase pages
todos.details: Implement automated email funnel (Day 0, 3, 7, 14). Each email drives toward product purchase with different positioning.

todos.title: Week 7: LAUNCH - Dropshipping Book Live
subtasks: Dropshipping book LIVE on Amazon KDP
Manual AI evaluator operational (you respond to submissions)
todos.details: Week 7 Launch Metrics: Book live, evaluator operational, 50+ submissions, <10 platform bugs. Begin validation tracking.

todos.title: Week 7-13: Validation & Gate Reviews
todos.details: 19 gates total. All must pass before scaling to 49 other topics. Validate: content resonates, design scales, platform stable, email reliable, evaluator converts >10%, revenue >$5K.

todos.title: Week 8-9: Design Batch B (Topics 6-10)
todos.details: Designer cycles to Batch B while you continue writing Batch C content. Maintain 1-2 batch lead time.

todos.title: Week 6+: Platform Development Phase 1 (Minimal)
todos.details: Minimal viable platform. Automate evaluator engine once revenue validates model ($5K+/week). Full custom platform Phase 2 ($15-25K investment).

todos.title: Week 13: Validation Decision Point
subtasks: Review Week 13 metrics: 500+ customers, $5K+ revenue, 10%+ conversion, 4.0+ stars
Decision: Scale to 49 topics or reassess positioning
todos.details: Decision matrix: All gates pass → Proceed to scale. Any critical gate fails → Fix before continuing. Revenue below target → Reassess pricing.

phase1.name: Launch & Validate
phase1.goal: Dropshipping test case validated, first 20 topics live

phase3.name: Optimize & Scale
phase3.goal: A/B testing, improved funnels, advanced features
